schema.description: Specifies fields to update. Omitted fields remain unchanged.

synonym_type.description:
Defines how the `term` relates to its synonyms.

- EQUIVALENT: Treat all terms as interchangeable.
- ONE_WAY: Expand only from `term` to `synonyms`.
- GROUP: Treat all synonyms as interchangeable within the group.
synonym_type.title: SynonymType

schema.title: SynonymUpdate
